items.title: Confirm social media assets sent to Upcode
items.summary: Interview Valet delivered social media assets for 'Aging Well' content. Dr. Haas is asking if these have been forwarded to UPQODE yet.
items.actionNeeded: Confirm whether social media assets were sent to UPQODE.

items.title: Review and respond to 2 Market Media proposal
items.summary: Elizabeth Hoyt from 2 Market Media sent a partnership proposal focused on thought leadership, authority positioning, speaking platform, and media visibility following their discovery call.
items.actionNeeded: Review the Discovery Memo and respond with questions or next steps.

items.title: Follow-up on AI recorder transcript storage question
items.summary: Dr. Haas asked Ivan Bunin where to store transcripts from Fellow.ai recorder in his Second Brain setup.
items.actionNeeded: Review Ivan's response when received or follow up if needed.
